commits.message: Phase 3.3 cutover: API-only ingest mode live, Nightscout polling disabled
Post-mortem RPI: fix API logging, remove dead code, add device observability
Fix ruff import ordering regression in app.py
Add per-device token auth and conditional relay routing
Add ruff linter, pyright type checking, and GitHub Actions CI
Add GOALS.yaml with 12 forward-looking fitness goals
Post-mortem RPI: module-level imports, narrow except, deploy script
Update docs: post-mortem cleanup complete, smoke test, SLOC/commit counts
Fix smoke test: experiments/test requires auth (expect 401)
Post-mortem cleanup: document quality_flag policy, refactor SQL, add smoke test
Move inline json imports to module-level in ingest_routes.py
Add sync_gwefan.py to update website stats from islet repo
Update docs: Phase 3.3 soak status, Zukka pipeline, sgv.json endpoint
Add GET /entries/sgv.json for Zukka CGM polling
Update progress report: Zukka replaces Shuggah
Return records with _id in POST response (Nightscout compat)
Update progress report: Phase 3.3 soak with Shuggah compatibility
Shuggah/xDrip4iOS compatibility: status, treatments GET/DELETE, dedup
Phase 3.3 prep: extract backoff helper, harden daemon, add 29 tests
Add relay timeout and mixed-batch test scenarios
